passage: The office recycling station sits beside the staff kitchen so people can sort items while making tea or lunch. One bin is marked for paper, another for plastic bottles, and a smaller tray is used for metal cans. A notice above the station asks staff to remove food containers before throwing anything away because leftover liquid can ruin a full bag. At the end of the day, the facilities team empties the bins into the loading area for collection. The writer says the station works well because the labels are clear and the bins are placed where employees naturally walk past them.
instructions: Label the diagram below. Use NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.

labels.evidence: One bin is marked for paper
labels.explanation: The paper bin is clearly named.
The bottle bin is for plastic bottles.

labels.evidence: a smaller tray is used for metal cans
labels.explanation: The tray is for metal cans.

labels.evidence: empties the bins into the loading area for collection
labels.explanation: The collection area is the loading area.

passage: The campsite map shows a reception hut at the entrance and a path leading to the river picnic area. Showers are located beside the main wash block, while the quiet tent field is set farther away from the car park so noise is reduced at night. A small supply shed stores firewood and spare gas canisters, and the map also marks an aid room next to the ranger office. The notice reminds visitors that the river crossing should be used only during daylight.
instructions: Label the diagram below. Use NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.

labels.evidence: a reception hut at the entrance
labels.explanation: The entrance hut is the reception hut.

labels.evidence: Showers are located beside the main wash block
labels.explanation: The shower area is the wash block.

labels.evidence: A small supply shed stores firewood and spare gas canisters
labels.explanation: The storage building is the supply shed.

labels.evidence: the map also marks an aid room next to the ranger office
labels.explanation: The passage identifies the medical space as the aid room.

passage: The bicycle repair kit is packed in a zip case that fits under the saddle. Inside, riders will find a multi-tool, tyre levers, a small pump, and a patch pack for punctures. The writer recommends placing the pump near the opening so it can be reached quickly on the roadside, while the patch pack should stay in the inner pocket where it will not be crushed. A cloth is included to wipe grease from hands before the bike is lifted back onto the stand. The note says the kit is most useful when all the parts are returned to their own places after each ride.
instructions: Label the diagram below. Use NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.

labels.evidence: packed in a zip case that fits under the saddle
labels.explanation: The kit container is the zip case.

labels.evidence: Inside, riders will find ... a small pump
labels.explanation: The pump is the roadside tool.
The repair item is the patch pack.

labels.evidence: A cloth is included to wipe grease from hands
labels.explanation: The cloth is the cleaning item.
